sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ إِيمَانُ تَشْعُرُ بِالتَّعَبِ بَعْدَ كُلِّ يَوْمٍ دِرَاسِيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Iman se osjećala umorno nakon svakog školskog dana.
sentences.translationEn: Iman used to feel tired after every school day.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ أَنْ تَأْخُذَ اسْتِرَاحَةً قَصِيرَةً بَعْدَ الظُّهْرِ.
sentences.translation: Odlučila je da uzme kratku pauzu poslije podne.
sentences.translationEn: She decided to take a short rest in the afternoon.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَتْ فِي الْهُدُوءِ وَشَرِبَتْ كُوبًا مِنَ الشَّايِ.
sentences.translation: Sjedila je u tišini i popila šolju čaja.
sentences.translationEn: She sat in the quiet and drank a cup of tea.

sentences.translation: Odmor obnavlja energiju i bistri um.
sentences.translationEn: Rest renews energy and clears the mind.
